benchmarks.title: DeepSWE
benchmarks.sourceNote: Illustrative snapshot from the public DeepSWE leaderboard (mini-swe-agent). Scores and costs are not live OpenCodex metering.

provenance.license: Public leaderboard snapshot; verify current rankings on the source before citing.

benchmarks.title: AA Coding Agent
benchmarks.sourceNote: Artificial Analysis Coding Agent Index snapshot (post GPT-5.6 GA, 2026-07-09). See provenance.url. Not live OpenCodex metering.

provenance.license: Figures from Artificial Analysis public pages; not affiliated with AA.

benchmarks.title: AA Intelligence Index
benchmarks.sourceNote: Illustrative snapshot inspired by Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index cost-per-task (Answer / Reasoning / Cache write / Cache hit / Input). Totals match published headline figures where noted; segment splits are approximate for charting. Not live OpenCodex metering.

provenance.license: Figures from Artificial Analysis public pages; not affiliated with AA.

benchmarks.title: FrontierCode
benchmarks.sourceNote: Illustrative snapshot from cognition.com/frontiercode (FrontierCode 1.1 Main, Jul 2026). Score = mergeability rubric; cost = mean USD per rollout. Best vs all reasoning modes match Cognition’s leaderboard toggle. Not live OpenCodex metering.

provenance.license: Public FrontierCode snapshot; verify on cognition.com before citing.

benchmarks.title: FrontierSWE
benchmarks.sourceNote: Illustrative snapshot from frontierswe.com (Mean@5 dominance). X-axis uses blended public API $/MTok as a relative cost proxy — not measured $/task. Not live OpenCodex metering.

provenance.license: Scores from FrontierSWE; costs are illustrative API/relative blends, not measured $/task.

benchmarks.title: Terminal Bench 2.1
benchmarks.sourceNote: Illustrative mix of Snorkel-verified Terminal-Bench 2.1 rows + published GPT-5.6 figures. Costs are approximate proxies (DeepSWE overlap or API-tier estimates). Not live OpenCodex metering.

provenance.license: Harness results from Terminal-Bench; costs are estimates / API blends.

benchmarks.title: Program Bench
benchmarks.sourceNote: Illustrative snapshot from programbench.com (mini-SWE-agent, 200 tasks). Score = almost-resolved (≥95% tests). Costs from published run averages where available; GPT-5.5 costs are estimates. Not live OpenCodex metering.

provenance.license: Scores from ProgramBench; some cost fields disputed vs extended board — treated as estimated.

benchmarks.title: SWE Marathon
benchmarks.sourceNote: Illustrative snapshot from swe-marathon.org (pass@1 on 20 ultra-long-horizon tasks). Cost axis is an estimated relative run cost (long trajectories); not published $/task. Not live OpenCodex metering.

provenance.license: Scores from SWE-Marathon; costs are estimates.

benchmarks.title: Frontend Code Arena
benchmarks.sourceNote: Illustrative snapshot from arena.ai Code Arena | WebDev (Elo from blind human votes on frontend tasks, Jul 16 2026). X-axis is blended public API $/MTok — preference Elo has no $/task. Not live OpenCodex metering.

provenance.license: Elo/scores from Code Arena; costs are estimates.

benchmarks.title: Cybench
benchmarks.sourceNote: Illustrative snapshot from cybench.github.io (unguided % solved on professional CTF tasks). Many rows are system-card / subset results, not one uniform full-suite run. Costs are relative agent-run estimates — Cybench does not publish $/task. Not live OpenCodex metering.

provenance.license: Please cite Cybench when republishing results (see cybench.github.io).
